_comment: Publicly accessible free node/proxy sources. Respect robots.txt and terms of service of each source.

free_node_sources.name: ebrasha-free-v2ray
free_node_sources.note: Updated every 30 minutes. Plain text vless/vmess links.

free_node_sources.name: a2470982985-getNode-v2ray
free_node_sources.note: Hourly updated mixed free nodes from getNode. Currently empty/placeholder file.

free_node_sources.name: qjlxg-aggregator-nodes
free_node_sources.note: Aggregated public nodes, plain text links.

free_node_sources.name: gfpcom-trojan
free_node_sources.note: Hourly updated public trojan nodes (plain text).

free_node_sources.name: gfpcom-vless
free_node_sources.note: Hourly updated public vless nodes (plain text).

free_node_sources.name: gfpcom-vmess
free_node_sources.note: Hourly updated public vmess nodes (plain text).

free_node_sources.name: gfpcom-ss
free_node_sources.note: Hourly updated public Shadowsocks nodes (plain text).

free_node_sources.name: ermaozi-get-subscribe-v2ray
free_node_sources.note: 12-hour updated free airport subscription (Base64). Non-GitHub source, enable with caution.

free_node_sources.name: freefq-free
free_node_sources.note: Historic free node list. Currently inactive (last update 2024-02).

free_node_sources.name: nirevil-sstime
free_node_sources.note: Shadowsocks nodes collected by NiREvil, updated via GitHub Actions.

free_node_sources.name: epodonios-v2ray-sub11
free_node_sources.note: VLESS subscription Sub11 from Epodonios v2ray-configs (Base64).

free_node_sources.name: epodonios-v2ray-sub20
free_node_sources.note: VLESS subscription Sub20 from Epodonios v2ray-configs (Base64).

free_proxy_apis.name: proxifly-free-proxy-list
free_proxy_apis.note: Public HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy list, validated every 5 minutes.

free_proxy_apis.name: gfpcom-http
free_proxy_apis.note: Hourly updated public HTTP proxy list. Large file (~400k entries), enable only if you need a huge pool.

free_proxy_apis.name: gfpcom-https
free_proxy_apis.note: Hourly updated public HTTPS proxy list. Large file (~400k entries), enable only if you need a huge pool.

free_proxy_apis.name: gfpcom-socks4
free_proxy_apis.note: Hourly updated public SOCKS4 proxy list. Very large file (~450k entries), enable only if you need a huge pool.

free_proxy_apis.name: gfpcom-socks5
free_proxy_apis.note: Hourly updated public SOCKS5 proxy list. Very large file (~470k entries), enable only if you need a huge pool.
